command.description: A string array representing the command that the container runs to determine if it is healthy. The first element is CMD or CMD-SHELL.

interval.description: The time period in seconds between each health check execution (default 30).

timeout.description: The time period in seconds to wait for a health check to succeed before it is considered a failure (default 5).

retries.description: The number of times to retry a failed health check before the container is considered unhealthy (default 3).

startPeriod.description: The optional grace period to provide containers time to bootstrap before failed health checks count towards the maximum retries (default 0).
